title: $10 Raise
writer: Peter B. Kyne, Henry Johnson, Lou Breslow
actors: Edward Everett Horton, Karen Morley, Alan Dinehart
plot: Hubert T. Wilkins is a timid, underpaid bookkeeper who, after long years of timidity, gets the courage from his sweetheart, Emily Converse, to ask his boss, gruff-and-mean Mr. Bates, for a $10 dollar raise. And gets fired. He and ...
